title: Farmer's Cutting Everything
description: Lets you cut most items into ingredients using cutting board mechanic.
body: ## 📜 Essence Farmer's Cutting Everything expands the cutting board recipes from Farmer’s Delight, letting you break down almost any item or block into parts or ingredients. ## 🎯 Features - Cut down items and blocks into components using the cutting board. - Works even for items without crafting recipes. - Designed to respect balance — no magical undo, just logical breakdowns. - Helpful if you accidentally crafted 64 of something you didn’t mean to. ## 📝 Description Farmer’s Cutting Everything helps turn mistakes/resource into useful materials again — all within the vanilla-friendly logic of cutting, slicing, and processing. This mod builds on the cutting board concept from Farmer’s Delight, unlocking its full potential. You can now place a wide range of items — even those without crafting recipes — onto the cutting board and break them into parts. ## 🙏 Credits - Big thanks to the [creator](https://modrinth.com/user/vectorwing) of [Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) for the original cutting board mechanic — that’s where it all started. - Inspired by the general idea of reverse-crafting like in [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) by [Benimatic](https://www.curseforge.com/members/benimatic/projects), but this mod is 100% original in code and concept. - Special thanks to [Ocean’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight) by [scouter567](https://modrinth.com/user/Scouter567) — their open-source code helped a lot with setting up proper datagen. ## 🗒️ Notes - This mod started as a simple frustration — some wooden items in Farmer’s Delight couldn’t be cut into planks. - Development had its challenges, and looking back, some things in the code could be cleaner. But hey — it was my first real experience with datagen. Learned a lot.
